title: Nursery Rhyme. DXLV. Natural History.
content:
Jack Sprat's pig,
        He was not very little,
        Nor yet very big;
        He was not very lean,
        He was not very fat;
        He'll do well for a grunt,
        Says little Jack Sprat.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. DXLV. Natural History."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
